infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Allow access to your calendar to import events into your timetable.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Allow full access to your calendar to import events into your timetable.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti: Allow access to add calendar events to your timetable.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Now to access your location to improve scheduling.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow Now to use speech recognition.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Now to use the microphone.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Now to use the camera.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Now to access your photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Now to save photos to your library.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Now to access your location to improve scheduling.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Now to access your photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Now to use the camera.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Now to use the microphone.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Now to use speech recognition.
